hero.headline: Implementation specialist who transforms data into working systems
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS implementations with deep expertise in data migration, system configuration, and cross-functional stakeholder management. 5+ years bridging technical execution with business outcomes — specializing in payroll, HR systems, and process optimization that drives measurable results.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations with full ownership of data migration, system configuration, and stakeholder coordination across technical and business teams.
Managed complex data migration projects involving multiple formats and legacy systems — engineered custom SaaS configurations and conducted thorough testing to ensure seamless platform adoption.
Facilitated cross-functional workshops with executives, IT teams, and operational stakeholders; translated requirements into technical specifications and project execution plans.
Served as primary technical point of contact post-implementation — providing ongoing support, identifying process improvements, and driving platform optimization based on user feedback.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Developed a systematic implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort estimation models — enabling accurate project scoping, automated timeline calculation, and standardized delivery processes that reduced implementation time by 30%.

highlights.label: Data Migration Excellence
highlights.text: Designed and executed data migration strategies for enterprise clients, handling diverse data formats and legacy system integrations — achieved 100% data accuracy with zero post-go-live data issues across all implementations.

highlights.label: Global Project Management
highlights.text: Managed on-site implementations across UK, US, and Middle East including complex half-million dollar engagements — coordinated multi-timezone teams, conducted stakeholder training, and ensured seamless go-live execution.

highlights.label: Platform Expertise & SME Development
highlights.text: Became subject matter expert across multiple platform modules within 3 months of role start — created comprehensive documentation, led knowledge transfer sessions, and mentored team members on technical best practices.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed large-scale data quality and process improvement initiatives for Amazon Fresh, Pantry, and Prime Now — directly impacting operational efficiency and customer experience.
Designed and implemented a data-driven defect prioritization framework using forecasting models and business metrics — delivered $230K in monthly operational savings.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to identify process gaps and implement systematic improvements — reduced invalid case routing by 50 assignments per day through SOP optimization.

summary: Implementation specialist with 5+ years delivering 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts with deep expertise in data migration, system configuration, and cross-functional project management. Proven track record of translating complex business requirements into working technical solutions while managing stakeholders across multiple timezones. Expert at becoming platform SME rapidly and driving process improvements that deliver measurable operational impact.
